case_title: FREDERICK T MARTIN VS. C ROBERT DURHAM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, FREDERICK T AS TRUSTEE OF THE GENEVIEVE M. GARIBALDI REVOCABLE TRUST UAD 5/12/89
